entries.gt_00615d990fe895: A shadow twitched in the frost: Hladonets holds the center of the cold chamber.
entries.gt_00acca21027c34: Take another cell. In the log it is listed as drowned anyway.
entries.gt_01484be1553aea: Betonoed went for the noise. The weak wall will soon become a passage.
entries.gt_018c9ffcd1c35d: Ventshun: coughing grates and a safe strip by the valve
entries.gt_01fdec76f9e75e: Lidia: "Kill two flying eyes in the steam passages. They warm themselves on the lamps."
entries.gt_03dbf723b99755: I was going to the kitchen and came out at the pipes. Or the other way around.
entries.gt_0471a163fe968a: The steam counts its target aloud: the hiss hits Paritel while he is on the bridge.
entries.gt_04c4a47243bd6e: The weak wall is already sealed.
entries.gt_050649470f2a72: Take it by act, not by habit. The walls here like witnesses.
entries.gt_0646f31c704ac0: If you find an opened one, do not carry it in your hands. Seal first, then argue about the price.
entries.gt_0665f784785288: Bring me raw meat. Six pieces. The beasts on the lower tiers need feeding.
entries.gt_06726377ebd574: Every Rebar you kill frees a patch of air. I will be able to hear farther.
entries.gt_0758d61c437bbe: Nazar: "Kill the robot by the charge line. Then one energy cell can be written off without theft."
entries.gt_0ae931bbe140f1: I do not read the display board aloud anymore.
entries.gt_0b2e42cc4bee35: Did Sava send you? Tell him: the watermeter spins even without water. That is not an accident, it is a plan.
entries.gt_0c4907509c135f: Sava Watermeter. I count water that is not there, and the shortage that already was.
entries.gt_0c7aa62807e8c3: Filtronos pulled clean air from the box. The water gave back metal, the filter crumbled.
entries.gt_0db2961a1f00f7: Sava: "The radio shift needs pills. The interference bites right into the back of the head."
entries.gt_0e2d670451cd25: The pressure gauge lies by two atmospheres, but steadily. So now it is a standard.
entries.gt_0e79dde5710866: If the lamp above the cable burns steady, do not celebrate. Lampoviy is just eating neatly.
entries.gt_0f5f2d18c1c2dc: If the needle twitches again, count the tags, not other people's advice.
entries.gt_111a8ad35a08f5: Hladonets fell apart into dry frost. Tags and a warm cord show in the remains.
entries.gt_114c28e824ce00: Ventshun cutoff valve: pull and step away
entries.gt_151b72b20e7e1b: Ivanych: "Bring five wrenches. Without them I will not weld a single leak, and you should not stand in the puddle."
entries.gt_15829713247666: The sparking cable pulls at your step. Detour by the upper or lower tray, burn it with fire, or cut it with a cleaning kit.
entries.gt_15ac783a401f3f: A gear in the stop - and the slab will halt. Without a gear, take the bypass, but do not lead Rebar behind you.
entries.gt_1714581109e62c: Nina: "One gear in the Pressovik stop. Wait out the hit, reach the panel, and the line stops without funerals."
entries.gt_17426da8aaeffb: The spare filter closed the gap: the clean box can be taken after the fight.
entries.gt_18256647abd621: After the shift, a rumor will go around: black residue does not reflect light, it looks back.
entries.gt_1894ec604fb7a4: The last Chernosliz burst. The stain became flat.
entries.gt_19273137344eb6: [Gordon raises a hand - either a greeting, or checking the gloves.]
entries.gt_1a4e7359f3e301: Kira accepted three tags: the Pump Matka pressure has been discharged by act.
entries.gt_1ad61e196d6d5b: Leave while you are whole. Or stay - forever.
entries.gt_1bef95cf758394: Field log: do not shoot the Slimevik. Food or medicine means exchange; filter and container mean distance. Pressing close without protection gives sticky PSI noise.
entries.gt_1d521b6edb9f17: UV knocked a wet click out of the black residue.
entries.gt_1d6efcf6a4691a: [You remember Sergeant Barinov saying: "Looks like science is not everything after all."]
entries.gt_216b3a5d6c6030: Kot: "Six pieces of raw meat. Feed beasts. Otherwise they eat me."
entries.gt_231a41b474efa9: Black Slime sample taken. The residue understood that someone was looking at it.
entries.gt_234d3677550788: Luminova: "The NII needs a sealed blue sample. Do not open it: an intact seal is worth more than any story."
entries.gt_2393c24dc5a4e5: Valve ${closed}/3 torn off pressure. The eels knock quieter.
entries.gt_2481deae183824: Pressovik passed: the output cassette gave up metal and springs.
entries.gt_2485ff061567a5: Boris: "Three wrenches. One for the work, one to hold the door, and one for the commission after the accident."
entries.gt_24b381301de246: Take an antidepressant. It helps against the PSI background.
entries.gt_24c964b97610c1: The valve turned. Now you can hear it: ${pressureText(nextPressure)}.
entries.gt_252771eec88fb9: It wet-clicks underfoot. Go around the edge, shine UV, burn with fire, or seal the sample.
entries.gt_264418103c220c: The seal is already holding the Black Larva.
entries.gt_26fd86ee52ebba: Rail. Shaft security. Whoever climbs into a cabinet without an act becomes the act.
entries.gt_273300ffbc7095: [Gordon silently looks at you through his glasses.]
entries.gt_281b4e3bf91582: The best experiment with that filth is the one nobody had to repeat.
entries.gt_28eaf5fb98334a: Hee-hee... My name is Kot. I dive into water. Everything under the floor is old and tasty.
entries.gt_296b9fb359b764: Sava: "Tell Boris: the watermeter spins without water. Let him sign that this is normal."
entries.gt_2a3da4574071aa: The passenger made it? Good. Now let her stand by the wall and not repeat the car number aloud.
entries.gt_2b0d3f1509b320: Boris: "Rebar is scraping at the pumps. Remove two before they become part of the diagram."
entries.gt_2bced89e5a81bc: The third valve is off pressure. The dry perimeter holds the fight.
entries.gt_2bda66b67e0863: Zhanna: "Bring two metro tickets. One the turnstile will accept; the second proves the first was not a dream."
entries.gt_2d1c4f779888a6: Pressovik: output cassette after the slabs
entries.gt_2d86612703f805: Ada Coil. Charging is simple: plus to the signature, minus to the conscience.
entries.gt_2dc4660a7e9c6f: Bring an airtight sample and I will pay for it as a scientific reagent, without stories about a battery for the whole shift.
entries.gt_302a14f17577c6: If the lamp above the third display board blinked twice, keep your weapon closer.
entries.gt_30602301a2d402: Sava: "One eye is watching the meter. Kill it before it becomes an auditor."
entries.gt_3066844dee0cf3: A raw Black Slime sample was taken. The jar clicks from inside.
entries.gt_30c8ef2ac22c84: I do not have enough wrenches. The wild steal them, deadmen gnaw them, and I walk around with one.
entries.gt_3139b7006be9da: Sasha: "Three fuses into panel N-089. With dry hands. After that the lift will at least stop choosing floors by smell."
entries.gt_316376f730a021: Betonoed went deeper into the concrete.
entries.gt_31a49a51cd4585: You do not buy a ticket. You prove it.
entries.gt_329349495e5c38: You are good. Kot does not eat that kind.
entries.gt_329387594f4706: The radio caught floor 404. They demand readings there too.
entries.gt_35f5c789484212: Pressovik is silent. Now the line is dangerous only because management will hear the silence.
entries.gt_3851072ad9462e: Slime sample from the singing vent channel.
entries.gt_391a9fbef67aa7: The weak seam is sealed. Betonoed lost the short exit.
entries.gt_3a1ffd1a8860bc: Shaft N-089 jerks the cable as if the lift is arguing with the number.
entries.gt_3a2904be5cff79: Roundsman's log: Kabelnik holds the straight line. If you see a blue spark, do not step through it. The upper and lower trays are dry; the cable can be removed with a cleaning kit or fire.
entries.gt_3a852198bb7266: Bridge kit: keep to the dry edge, do not finish the eel in the water, take the route tag from the far box.
entries.gt_3c24c8e8daf7ba: These pipes are our territory. Tell your Gensek to choke on his carpets.
entries.gt_3e14e75fd9dae0: The sealed material went into accounting. Now it is dangerous at least by schedule.
entries.gt_3f4c4b4587ff19: Is the gasket dry? Then the faucet can still be persuaded. Do not shove a wet one at me; it is already on the water's side.
entries.gt_43da0ab61f4d28: I am Lidia. Steam is not drawn here, it is filed by act.
entries.gt_4411c3a923fc21: Remove the tag after crossing: dry lamps lead along the edge, the eel loses tempo on concrete.
entries.gt_46b1ae4d3e5929: Sanitary post memo: count brown slime as toxic before the act, and do not touch it with your hands after the act. A sealed sample can be surrendered to Bokova, burned in the furnace, or sold without a log. Fire is faster than a kit, but gasoline is not issued twice.
entries.gt_489670f16ed995: Sealed sample from the vent channel. The NII post will accept it as brown; the furnace will accept it as hazardous.
entries.gt_48c06cd1e662c1: Hee-hee! Filling. The beasts will not touch me today.
entries.gt_497603f443c842: The lift diagram reduces the error, but does not cancel the line's character.
entries.gt_49e8159098683d: Sasha: "Check shaft N-089 {dir}. If the cable is intact and the wire is not warm, we will repair the route, not bury the cab."
entries.gt_4bba2cbe2c5052: A harpoon keeps water honest better than a bullet. Electricity helps too, if you do not stand in the tray.
entries.gt_4d5bb916216998: Want war? You will get it. The wild do not surrender.
entries.gt_5070e7d1da71c0: NII of Slime log, OVS: the green sample eats organics and cloth. Take it through a filter layer; without one, a second attempt will spoil the catch and form 728/01-D.
entries.gt_51c65ec3c3f5f6: The seal is already holding the black residue.
entries.gt_5340bc26e5797f: The route is holding. Not forever, but at least the lift rides by button again.
entries.gt_54936a12a22b34: The ventilation takes a wet note. The HUD catches the direction to the sampler.
entries.gt_55dae80eb720d4: Three valves are already closed. The steam bridge is heard only by water.
entries.gt_56483cdcb911af: Sealant caught the larva together with the eyes. The residue became flat.
entries.gt_56e9d0691c7077: UV revealed the eyes and dried the larva into a safe film.
entries.gt_5b37b7e5748e83: Steam cuts sight and skin. Close the valve or go into the wet tray.
entries.gt_5cd061ce9f4b06: Filtronos rasped by the empty box: there are no clean supplies left there.
entries.gt_5cd0c18ef8aa83: You slipped through Betonoed's passage. The route got shorter, the air worse.
entries.gt_5dcbecd5c3ec1b: Watch the lamps and the red floor: one hit, one pause, one step into the white lane.
entries.gt_5dfbc772e7d457: The dry edge held. Pressure no longer commands your feet.
entries.gt_5f730973bd2f03: The singing led to the sample jar. Taking it or leaving the niche shut is now a choice.
entries.gt_5f90f70f0d53f5: In the furnace the sample becomes dry residue. In my hands, debt, rumor, and money.
entries.gt_608fafa6f815de: Tokens ring louder when the train lies.
entries.gt_61903a33767a2f: the tone pulls toward the sampler
entries.gt_63f5b2cfdacc30: Vera: "Brown sample from the dry bypass into the bunker. I will return quenched residue: worse than goods, better than a living smell."
entries.gt_651af4786f40a5: If you decide to destroy the blue sample, bring it sealed. I do not take an opened one in my hands.
entries.gt_675589fef7c88e: Ada: "Two microchips into the dispatch room. Dry hands. One cell goes to you as a repair expense."
entries.gt_67c8a88c3888ab: Filtronos put its nose into govnyak smoke. The filters can be pulled out quickly.
entries.gt_693e9ff24abb5c: Why feed them? So they let you pass. If you do not feed them, they eat you. Logic, yeah.
entries.gt_695e680183aad9: Two microchips - and I will run one cell through as a repair expense.
entries.gt_6b1253a2cb2911: Senka: "Do not burn the brown sample. Bring it to me whole - the market loves what is officially supposed to disappear."
entries.gt_6bb3576abf3f1f: I am building a PSI emitter from cabinets, coils, and other people's write-off acts. So far it only hums and dries mold.
entries.gt_6db6af1459cdba: It sticks to your feet. Go around the edge, burn with fire, or clean it with a kit.
entries.gt_6e00803e522cc8: NII singing vent channel: slime in the grille
entries.gt_6e7b76c645819c: I am a plumber. Ivanych. Thirty years in these pipes. I know every riser.
entries.gt_6f0f262b51c91c: Borya: "Two fuses for the switch. If the switch is silent, the train chooses who to punish by itself."
entries.gt_6f5a5e86137e90: The station makes cells slowly. Hands reach for them faster.
entries.gt_710b8ac6b52f63: Liquidators guard the output cabinet, the wild wait behind the wet wall. Choose a side before the noise.
entries.gt_721983d04c16a0: Silencer: "Bring the blue sample in its seal. We will destroy it by act, without glowing pockets and extra witnesses."
entries.gt_723df78f7a9312: Good clot. Still warm, but already sellable.
entries.gt_7274bd45c596f1: Feed slime holds boots weakly. The Slimevik can lick it off for food or medicine.
entries.gt_73c05a4bc6dcce: Brown sample burned through in the deactivation furnace
entries.gt_7568833cbb4ce3: Pump Matka tore off the pressure
entries.gt_75aecea2014f6f: Dust spills from the ceiling: the grate coughs metal. Better not stand under the pipes.
entries.gt_76bbafa2bd74c3: Vera Luminova. Blue light holds shape while the seal is intact.
entries.gt_7789c22fee0086: Black Slime blinked: a Chernosliz rose from the stain.
entries.gt_7a27ffd77a544e: Sealant closed the residue before it managed to grow a Chernosliz.
entries.gt_7cb792a7ff918c: Vera: "A gasoline canister into the furnace expense. For fuel I will issue dry residue and a filter, without pretty words about purity."
entries.gt_7d1da946d0d063: If you find more Rebar noise, come back.
entries.gt_7da57f9a0aac5f: Blue sample sold to the NII
entries.gt_7e397972ab4ef3: Kira Manometer. Here the pump breathes not air, but eels.
entries.gt_7e62ee4e4b7b0c: Kill three. I will thank you - I have a "Return". Teleport. Useful thing.
entries.gt_7ff730f4100d0e: Filtronos finished off before opening the box. The filter reserve stayed dry.
entries.gt_809d38b3a44235: Keep the gasket dry. A wet gasket is not a part, but a promise of flood.
entries.gt_814ee9f2fc06ca: Do not pull from the cabinet in front of Nazar. He counts cartridges better than letters.
entries.gt_81bcb3b3d02244: The pipe knocks by surname? Do not answer. Wrench on valve, then one step back.
entries.gt_82432af511a805: The Black Larva clicked and raised eyes out of the residue.
entries.gt_825b673e541cbd: Lida: "Escort me to Borya Coupler. I do not want to be a stop anymore."
entries.gt_82a7f878e8b4c0: Hear the crackle? Those are Rebar beasts. They emit on 27 MHz. That is not normal.
entries.gt_83314fbb30e89d: If the lamps blink, do not trust your eyes. Trust the floor: dry floor means you can go.
entries.gt_8366b1cd2f1829: We are free people. Neither the Ministry nor the liquidators order us around.
entries.gt_8427b5738249b1: [The HEV suit indicator blinks quietly on his chest. 76% armor.]
entries.gt_84554b0f0da8cc: If you have a rounds form, keep it dry. The lift reads stains.
entries.gt_850c132afbfd23: You stepped under the marked pipes. Ventshun answers from the ceiling.
entries.gt_870ea18e2008b0: The cable is warm - do not stroke it with your sleeve. Phase loves those who hurry.
entries.gt_88088108c8bac2: A fuse in the switch is more important than cursing and cheaper than cartridges.
entries.gt_89aa610cfbbbf8: The player left from under the grate. Ventshun knocked on empty concrete and quieted down.
entries.gt_8af24bcd59a48a: The cult witness was removed. The Black Larva was left without a choir.
entries.gt_8b01f146760df3: ${ROOM_PREFIX}: short passage behind an edible wall
entries.gt_8b12aaab228f38: Sump: do not shoot from the water. Dry bright edge, UV impulse, cleaning kit. Sample only into NII container; do not write "Slurry-chan" in the log.
entries.gt_8b6d55565edc69: Gleb: "Kill three Rebar beasts. They jam the air."
entries.gt_8b778d698ec520: Kira Manometer: "After three valves, finish the Pump Matka. Before that, it only teaches water to bite."
entries.gt_8c8097d29b0ee3: A depot without rails exists. The rails did not agree to go there.
entries.gt_8d64beb5d65760: The microchips seated. Now the line at least knows where the current is flowing.
entries.gt_8ec468c57e4745: The relay is warm - so the line is lying. First dry floor, then hands on the panel.
entries.gt_8f38a4ea3874c9: The emitter works. Quieter. Hear the hum? That is not victory, that is the coil finally hitting the frequency.
entries.gt_8f8e2b65ea73e3: The repeater catches an old order: surrender pressure, admit no leaks.
entries.gt_8fe64154f02070: [From his look you understand that he is a highly trained professional and doesn't need to hear all of this.]
entries.gt_8ff1a416586bb4: Sealant caught the filter box: Filtronos is sucking air past the supplies.
entries.gt_9102e164d02b34: Ventshun jerked the grate, but the pipe stayed empty.
entries.gt_9152ac3c26d180: Black Slime trembled, but no new eyes appeared.
entries.gt_91fe3e6acab6b0: Bring five wrenches and I will roll you a tank of fuel. Straight from the canister.
entries.gt_94a6be4a40b89b: Sewage is not a canal. It is a wet corridor under pressure. Listen to the pipe, not the map.
entries.gt_9595a2b24a22b6: Their fuel is under seal. A seal is a request to open carefully.
entries.gt_95d848a929ae87: The Black Larva is sealed before waking.
entries.gt_964f723279b720: Nazar Discharge. The charge box is not empty, it is under account.
entries.gt_9683527e2141b7: Makhno! Batko Makhno! Who is asking?!
entries.gt_9686a15ef4e1ff: Ah, a guest. Come in, just not in the puddle: the generator is arcing to the floor again.
entries.gt_98355adc2d4f54: Black Slime sample taken after treatment. The jar does not knock.
entries.gt_98f143bb9d59ea: Marked feed sample: safer after barter with the Slimevik.
entries.gt_9c017fee85ee9c: Concrete crunches behind the weak wall. Sealant, block kit, noise bait, or fire will decide the outcome.
entries.gt_9d40fc559e0420: Black Larva sanitary lock: UV fire seal
entries.gt_9d62d0b99668ab: Borshchevik sap burns skin. Chop stems, burn from afar, or take the dry bypass.
entries.gt_9e467d580ffb12: Bring wrenches. The section is held by one nut and my signature.
entries.gt_9e4ab2ca506bf4: Collectors: the dry bypass gives a brown sample; the deactivation furnace quenches it into dry residue, and the filter is issued by act.
entries.gt_9e509839ccd39f: The valve struck the riser: Ventshun choked in the pipe.
entries.gt_9ed4fe817d8955: I am Professor Tesla. Not that one, naturally. But a surname obliges.
entries.gt_a0894f653901c0: If a faucet coughs purple, close your mouth first, then the riser.
entries.gt_a25df5ea75a771: You can replace the fuses and give the route a chance. You can take the diagram and leave richer.
entries.gt_a3bc3c0bbe7bfa: Go along the dry edge. Three tags from the valves - then shoot the Matka, not before.
entries.gt_a597d41f5cdccb: The passage is sealed. Betonoed scrapes concrete on the other side.
entries.gt_a6586c709bed25: [Gordon silently looks through you. His glasses glare.]
entries.gt_a67d17a8c3986f: If you need to swim, go from the diver cache to the dry bridge. There should be a route tag in the box on the far edge.
entries.gt_a9a5a080808aea: The valve still knocks. Count the hissing, then turn the next one.
entries.gt_aa4dfdf9d1d383: If Boris says it is green, then it is green. If the floor is wet, write in red.
entries.gt_ab6c99db1d8e47: Chernosliz burst. There are still ${remaining} in the stain.
entries.gt_abaeabd36f548d: The vent's singing quieted behind you. The sample stayed in the emergency niche.
entries.gt_ac16fa3e96e73d: The seal went into the furnace. For today, only the lamp is glowing.
entries.gt_ad83ef5de4f7a7: Eyes love warm tunnels. Two fewer eyes means one safer route.
entries.gt_adf9e7057e2334: If the train asks for your name, stay silent.
entries.gt_af3477952ee64b: [He says nothing. That already says everything.]
entries.gt_b0a72dd82bed15: The main thing is do not drink from the canal. A beast lives there, and chlorine.
entries.gt_b125f2511e58a3: Rail: "Bring the lift rounds form. Repair is repair, but without paper the numbered failure will turn us into passengers again."
entries.gt_b2b0f1a909a810: Pressure Dispatcher Boris. Green lamp - we live. Red - we write the explanation posthumously.
entries.gt_b2f7143111a230: First the grate coughs, then the lunge. Do not stand under the pipe.
entries.gt_b55196f922ea6b: Paritel fell into condensate. Only pipes and wet floor remain on the bridge.
entries.gt_b6c57460b9ea3a: The slurry sump is wet and toxic. Keep to the dry lit edge.
entries.gt_baa2e20d63ebd4: My job is simpler: whole jar into the furnace, log for signature, corridor working again.
entries.gt_bb748724d150af: Black Slime antechamber: fire UV sealant
entries.gt_bbc3dbc402c2f9: Steam tore the ice off Hladonets. He became lower, slower, and is looking for a far corner.
entries.gt_bc5f3299771a2e: The robot is silent. Now you can hear the box thinking about the shortage.
entries.gt_bda8114894053c: Rail: "Lampoviy is eating light by the emergency stairs. Without light, a repairman becomes a rumor."
entries.gt_bf8716b63a6df4: Take the sheets and springs at the exit while the shift backdates the act.
entries.gt_bf89ee5e92091e: Pressovik: service bypass and stop panel
entries.gt_c04174680d2779: The Pump Matka choked. The cabinet on the dry island can be dismantled calmly.
entries.gt_c0e5a09447543f: Look at the display board, do not listen to the voice. Sometimes the voice comes from another station.
entries.gt_c19797a096e5be: The wall went quiet. Betonoed lost interest in this seam.
entries.gt_c20cbf8bf11d1a: The lift smells of ozone - first the panel, then the button, then the cursing.
entries.gt_c26f4847181800: Tag: Ventshun only hears those standing still.
entries.gt_c43881fe3e11a2: Fire curled the Black Larva into PSI ash.
entries.gt_c6d8d09a2ac250: Come by if you see a leak. I will weld it.
entries.gt_c6ec856a7eb83e: Filtronos finished off. One usable filter layer was removed from the nose mesh.
entries.gt_c6f961a3c2ee87: Do not stand in the puddle under the lamp. The electrician will say "phase" later, and I will have to pull you out.
entries.gt_c77294a6428154: If you carry the sample in your pocket, do not sit next to people afterward.
entries.gt_c7a0883a20f514: [He shifts the wrench to a better grip. Says nothing.]
entries.gt_c921b635eb4b41: If N-1337 arrives, do not brag about the repair. It does not like understandable people.
entries.gt_c97df623ccc526: We need energy cells. Five of them. Bring them and I will give you a PSI beam prototype. Hold it like a cutter, not a souvenir.
entries.gt_ca48c3e2ea1c18: Ventshun twitched in the pipe. There are still ${remaining} under the grate.
entries.gt_cab5f7d0ec721d: The air is cleaner. Now I hear the Ministry. Amazing.
entries.gt_cb2ba22f1d296b: The red lower line runs fastest of all. That is why it most often arrives in the wrong place.
entries.gt_cb92bb51a4382a: The cable is clean. Security will write that down as discipline, not luck.
entries.gt_cba8b3a66046ea: Collectors: after the dry bypass, Senka by the furnace buys the brown sample before burning.
entries.gt_cd033f77628b9f: Do not take it if the song goes both ways. In the act write: pressure, not voice. Do not open the seal: Bokova will log it, Vera will burn it, Senya will buy it.
entries.gt_cec08a6f33b744: Rebar is knocking on the guides. A little more and the cab will ride sideways.
entries.gt_cee71b6369937c: Do not open the ampoule in the corridor. Then it is a sample, not a sanitary story.
entries.gt_ceea44c894ad6e: Take me to the coupler. At least he pretends to understand the schedule.
entries.gt_d03f14e738b197: Now I have a reserve. Thank you, dear.
entries.gt_d07327181ec6fe: Sanitary-bypass seal: brown sample after dry cleanup.
entries.gt_d0b5a97fb559ff: Filter cache memo: if the box breathes inward, first sealant on the gap or govnyak to the side. A living Filtronos spoils only this reserve.
entries.gt_d1e9c8fe85ecfb: Sasha: "Two Rebars are hitting the guides. Remove them before the cab decides to become a wall."
entries.gt_d5b6d9e62633a7: Kot got the diver route tag back from the dry bridge.
entries.gt_d67666d7dd24ae: Let the furnace hum for the report. We work quieter.
entries.gt_d7447852e0605f: Toxic brown slime holds boots and carries smell into the riser. A cleaning kit or fire removes the stain.
entries.gt_d7a64098d876a9: Pressovik: line stopped by emergency stop
entries.gt_d8a73115d97fb4: The Black Larva is already burned out: nothing to seal.
entries.gt_dabc3cd35e200f: Betonoed gnawed through the concrete. A shortcut opened, but it is not empty.
entries.gt_dafc81852dc9be: If the turnstile cools down, do not argue. Wait.
entries.gt_db13c598befe81: Sava: "Two wrenches for verification. One turns the nut, the second persuades the commission."
entries.gt_db367e28eb1432: Pressovik: service bypass after the stop
entries.gt_db70d822433212: Silencer. Scientists call it a sample while it is in a jar.
entries.gt_dc66c16043d8a2: I am a coupler without a train. Here that is a normal post.
entries.gt_dc8a191a064def: Weak seam. Sealant will close it, noise bait will speed the gnaw-through, fire will drive Betonoed off.
entries.gt_dcaf0ee6119ff0: Do not stand in a puddle while charging. Phase does not check what pass you have.
entries.gt_dd7e1deda23163: Do not stand under the lamp if it has gone white. That is not light, that is a warning.
entries.gt_de063492f3276c: The furnace makes enough noise for management to hear the fuel expense.
entries.gt_de2abceaaa7cc6: Ventshun coughed metal: beasts crawled out of the marked grate.
entries.gt_dfddd9d47d1a88: The station was written on the ticket in my handwriting. I definitely did not write it.
entries.gt_e0c9d809a6e25f: The robot by the line confused security with receiving. Knock it down and I will write off one cell legally.
entries.gt_e0fbc071ef9780: Sealed green sample of the slurry body
entries.gt_e310b919c7e70c: ${ROOM_PREFIX}: noisy storeroom by the weak wall
entries.gt_e41af293831e08: Kot: "There is a diver route tag on the dry bridge. Bring it, and I will tell you where the eel does not like air."
entries.gt_e4ae684927815a: Vera Quench. The furnace does not clean; it makes dirt fit for signature.
entries.gt_e4f49b2c19c124: Tesla: "Five energy cells. Without them the PSI emitter stays a wet heap of wires."
entries.gt_e7c4e8cc338772: Here, brother, everything breathes. Pipes. Walls. Concrete sucks water from the canal and belches it through the seams.
entries.gt_e80895d5d1f902: Black Slime sample pulled from under the seal.
entries.gt_e9d50ccb8246cc: Pressovik stopped. The red slabs no longer hold the step.
entries.gt_ed20e5d2ff5a79: Fire dried the black residue. PSI dust glimmers in the ash.
entries.gt_ed4b0482b3ca40: Red slab travel. Wait for the light, move into the white lane, or stop Pressovik at the panel.
entries.gt_ede1d894bd58d7: The valve cut off the coughing grate before the lunge.
entries.gt_ee5917e95d913a: A numbered lift loves blank documents. A rounds form is sometimes cheaper than cartridges.
entries.gt_eef2377332434e: The steam corridor has conditionally cooled.
entries.gt_ef6e085726a700: Liquidator memo: the Black Larva does not have to attack. UV dries the eyes, fire leaves PSI dust, a seal makes the sample safe. If a cult witness sings nearby, the raw jar wakes up.
entries.gt_f0620e973d8ce1: [He looks at the collector ceiling. Possibly searching for ventilation.]
entries.gt_f102d2cd9cfb62: Collectors: dry bridge over the eel trough; the far route box stands on the dry edge beyond the water.
entries.gt_f1a124a4643de2: Dust from the grate got on your hands. Ventshun warned you, but has not lunged yet.
entries.gt_f255cace593419: Red lamps mean overheating. Puddles mean condensate. Imagine the rest of the hissing yourself.
entries.gt_f285a061801910: Sealed jar under the singing valve
entries.gt_f2a0a31c3c008f: The last beast from the grate fell. Ventshun left only filter dust.
entries.gt_f378accc688f92: Batch quenched. Filter dry, act wet.
entries.gt_f3bdb7efdc6505: Betonoed went for the noise. The weak wall got a short pause.
entries.gt_f4450a745371ad: Senka Canister. Liquidators call this hazardous residue; the market calls it goods.
entries.gt_f4785ec1530e5e: The Black Larva twitched, but the residue could no longer rise.
entries.gt_f4e23b83412427: NII dry box: UV salt container
entries.gt_f558a239b58cd1: The Black Larva went silent, but the stain can still only be taken with UV or a seal.
entries.gt_f66de474c3a5a1: Betonoed lost the gnaw-through and retreated from the seam.
entries.gt_f7767756e25cb0: Sealant set: Chernosliz settled into a black film.
entries.gt_f7fda57f9b309e: [Gordon rummages through the nearest junk pile as if looking for a crowbar?]
entries.gt_f8b6e19afc2aa7: The meter is spinning backward again. Good. That means the debt is going into the walls.
entries.gt_f8e64f3b116c82: Shh... I am Gleb. Radio operator from the science block. I catch the air in these pipes.
entries.gt_fa54470d43b997: The metal cough quieted behind you. Ventshun knocked on empty concrete.
entries.gt_fb2f1f76d45384: Kira Manometer: "Take three tags off the valves along the dry perimeter. Pressure will go into the trays, not into you."
entries.gt_fb6382ae80dcb1: Fire drove Betonoed into the crack. The passage stayed, the beast left.
entries.gt_fbdbf15f1c8059: The Matka died, but the pressure is not discharged: the water in the trays stayed angry.
entries.gt_fc7aa544c4bbd2: An open gnaw-through can be closed with a block kit or sealant.
entries.gt_ff3720bcaaf4c5: Nina Stopper. Pressovik crushes not people, but haste. People just often look like haste.
entries.gt_ff542050ec260e: Sava: "Go into the flooded room and come back dry, at least in the report."
entries.gt_ff8edea4bd02ee: If you find strange clots, bring them in a jar. Without a jar it is no longer science, but cleanup.
entries.gt_fffb4c053c2e79: Sample into the bunker, fuel into the statement. Without gasoline, this is just a warm cabinet with pretensions.
